sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3248" key="a)kmoqe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκμοθέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τίθημι</etym>) <sense id="n3248.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">anvil-block</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
